name: playPopularKpopSong
description: Find and play the most popular K-pop song this month

parameters.name: timePeriod
parameters.description: Time period for the chart (e.g., 'this month', 'this week')

grammarPatterns: play the most popular kpop song $(timePeriod:wildcard)
get the most popular kpop song $(timePeriod:wildcard) and play it
find the hottest kpop song $(timePeriod:wildcard) and play it
play the number one kpop song $(timePeriod:wildcard)
